task_completion.description: Update all subsection headings to Heading 2
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show subsection headings selected with 'Heading 2' visible in the style dropdown/formatting toolbar, or the headings should visually appear as Heading 2 (typically larger and bolder than level 3).

task_completion.description: Replace manual Table of Contents with an auto-generated field
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Table of Contents, Index or Bibliography' dialog being used, or the resulting TOC should have a gray background (field shading) indicating it is an auto-generated field rather than plain text.

task_completion.description: Change the red text in the critical deficiency paragraphs to black
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the document body should show that paragraphs describing critical deficiencies, which were originally red, are now formatted with standard black text.

task_completion.description: Add a footer with page numbers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a footer area at the bottom of the document pages containing page numbers. The page numbers should ideally have a gray background indicating they are dynamic fields.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected report as building_audit_final.odt
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor should display 'building_audit_final.odt', or a 'Save As' dialog/file manager should show the file saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer GUI open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or python scripts modifying the .odt XML files directly.

integrity.description: The agent inserted a genuine auto-generated TOC rather than manually typing a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC should exhibit field shading (a gray background behind the text) or the agent should be seen interacting with the 'Insert Table of Contents' menu/dialog.

integrity.description: The agent inserted a dynamic page number field rather than typing static numbers on each page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page numbers in the footer should have field shading (gray background) or the agent should be seen using the 'Insert -> Page Number' or 'Insert -> Field' menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original document actually has 15 subsection headings (not 10 as the prompt claims) that must all be converted to Heading 2. There are exactly 3 paragraphs with red text that must be changed to black. The manual TOC must be completely replaced by an auto-generated Table of Contents (which typically shows gray field shading in LibreOffice). A footer with a page number field must be added. The final file must be saved exactly as 'building_audit_final.odt' in /home/ga/Documents/.
